parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(['XAUTOCLAIM', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream, $('Build Pop Context').first().json.group, $('Build Pop Context').first().json.consumer, String($('Build Pop Context').first().json.claimIdleMs), '0', 'COUNT', String($('Build Pop Context').first().json.batchSize)]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify(['XREADGROUP', 'GROUP', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.group, $('Build Pop Context').first().json.consumer, 'COUNT', String($('Build Pop Context').first().json.batchSize), 'STREAMS', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream, '>']) }}

={{ JSON.stringify(['XPENDING', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream, $('Build Pop Context').first().json.group, 'IDLE', '0', $('Merge Message').first().json.message_id, $('Merge Message').first().json.message_id, '1']) }}

={{ JSON.stringify(['XADD', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.dlqStream, '*', 'payload', typeof $json.payload === 'string' ? $json.payload : JSON.stringify($json.payload || {}), 'original_id', String($json.message_id), 'delivery_count', String($json.delivery_count), 'dlq_routed_at', new Date().toISOString(), 'dlq_reason', 'max_retries_exceeded']) }}
={{ JSON.stringify(['XACK', $('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream, $('Build Pop Context').first().json.group, $('Check DLQ Threshold').first().json.message_id]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify(['SET', `q:${$('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream}:permits:${$('Capacity Gate').first().json.message_id}`, JSON.stringify({message_id: $('Capacity Gate').first().json.message_id, execution_id: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.callerExecutionId, sub_execution_id: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.executionId, workflow_id: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.workflowId, workflow_name: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.workflowName, stream: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.stream, group: $('Build Pop Context').first().json.group, claimed_at: new Date().toISOString()}), 'EX', '86400']) }}
